return(function(...)local return(function(Y,m,g,O,w,v,x,j,W,P,N,H,f,q,p,d,l,k,n,t,T,R,C,b)R,k,T,H,N,C,t,P,q,f,n,b,W,l,p,d,j=function(Y)k[Y]=k[Y]-(719421+-719420)if k[Y]==-772561-(-772561)then k[Y],n[Y]=nil,nil end end,function(Y,Q)local m=f(Q)local g=function(g,O,w)return p(Y,{g,O,w},Q,m)end return g end return(d(6667379-826153,{}))(m(x))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[Q(-461165-(-510172))],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
